name: ScaleIn
description: Animates children with a scale + fade entrance on mount or viewport entry.

preset.description: Motion preset from the token system

viewThreshold.description: Fraction of element visible before triggering

layout.description: Wraps children in an animated div with scale + opacity transition.

aiPromptHint: Use ScaleIn for elements that should grow into view — buttons, cards, images, modals. Use preset='popIn' for a bouncier entrance with spring physics. The 'scale' prop controls initial size (0.92 = subtle grow, 0.5 = dramatic zoom). Combine with StaggerGroup for cascading card entrances.

examples.title: Pop-in effect
examples.code:
<ScaleIn preset="popIn" scale={0.8}>
  <button className="px-6 py-3 bg-accent text-white">Click me</button>
</ScaleIn>

examples.title: Staggered cards
examples.code:
<StaggerGroup stagger="normal">
  <ScaleIn><Card title="Plan A" /></ScaleIn>
  <ScaleIn><Card title="Plan B" /></ScaleIn>
  <ScaleIn><Card title="Plan C" /></ScaleIn>
</StaggerGroup>
